problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Federated. Federated learning without data centralization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
